SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-13-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SERVICE BY CERTIFIED MAIL MUST BE MADE BY THE COURT CLERK NOT THE PARTY. PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY TO THE CLERK TO SERVE DEFENDANT BY CERTIFIED MAIL PRIOR TO THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. HOWEVER, IF PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SERVED DEFENDANT BY THE NEXT HEARING, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO APPEARANCES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
